heading: Issues of fact in Supreme Court
label: 1872 Issues of fact in Supreme Court
text: In all original actions at law in the Supreme Court against citizens of the United States, issues of fact shall be tried by a jury.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 28, U.S.C., 1940 ed., § 343 (, ).Mar. 3, 1911, ch. 231, § 23536 Stat. 1156Changes were made in phraseology.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 28, U.S.C., 1940 ed., § 343 (, ).Mar. 3, 1911, ch. 231, § 23536 Stat. 1156Changes were made in phraseology.
